description.div: Niaoyu is and island of the Penghu Archipelago administered under the Baisha District. Ferry lines between Baisha and Niaoyu exist for the benefit of the Niaoyu community.
The Niaoyu Burial Ground is located at the north-east of the island.

text.transcription: 民國八九年庚辰陽月吉旦

trans.div: Gengchen, Yang month, auspicious day in 89 years of the Republic of China

text.transcription: 民國六十年辛亥孟冬重修

normalization.div: 民國6十年辛亥孟冬重修

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok lio̍k Tsa̍p Liân sin 亥 Bīng Tang tiōng siu
man4 gwok3 luk6 sap6 nin4 san1 hoi6 maang6 dung1 cung4/cung5/zung6 sau1
mínguó liù shí nián xīn hài mèng dōng zhòng xiū

trans.div: It was rebuilt by Meng Dong in the 60th year of the Republic of China.

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok tshit tsi̍t Liân 壬 戌 hua Gua̍t
man4 gwok3 cat1 jat1 nin4 jam4 seot1 faa1 jyut6
mínguó qī yī nián rén xū huā yuè

trans.div: Renxu Flower Moon in the 71st year of the Republic of China

text.transcription: 顕祖考石公諱牛角佳城重修

normalization.div: 顕祖考石公諱牛角佳城重修

transliterations.transliteration: hián tsóo khó tsio̍h Kong 諱 gû-kak kha siânn tiông siu
hin2 zou2 haau2 daam3/sek6 gung1 wai5 ngau4 gok3/luk6 gaai1 seng4/sing4 cung4/cung5/zung6 sau1
xiǎn zǔ kǎo shí gōng huì niú jiǎo jiā chéng zhòng xiū

trans.div: Zongzu Kao Shi Gongtao Niujiao Jiacheng was rebuilt

names.name: 將武威雕刻當石氏的堂號

text.transcription: 民國七十九年庚午陽月吉

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok tshit Tsa̍p kiú liân king ngóo Iûnn Gua̍t Kiat
man4 gwok3 cat1 sap6 gau2 nin4 gang1 ng5 joeng4 jyut6 gat1
mínguó qī shí jiǔ nián gēng wǔ yáng yuè jí

trans.div: In the year 79 of the Republic of China, the yang and the moon were auspicious.

text.transcription: 顯祖妣鄭門黃氏分佳城

normalization.div: 顯祖妣鄭門黃氏分佳城

transliterations.transliteration: hián tsóo pí tīng mn̂g hông sī pun kha siânn
hin2 zou2 bei2 zeng6/zing6 mun4 wong4 si6/zi1 fan1/fan6 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn zǔ bǐ zhèng mén huáng shì fēn jiā chéng

text.transcription: 民國六十八己未年陽月吉

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok lio̍k Tsa̍p pat kī buē Liân iông Gue̍h kiat
man4 gwok3 luk6 sap6 baat3 gei2 mei6 nin4 joeng4 jyut6 gat1
mínguó liù shí bā jǐ wèi nián yáng yuè jí

trans.div: In the 68th year of the Republic of China, the sun and moon are auspicious

text.transcription: 顕祖考鄭公諱算之佳城

transliterations.transliteration: hián tsóo khó tīng kong 諱 suàn tsi kha siânn
hin2 zou2 haau2 zeng6/zing6 gung1 wai5 syun3 zi1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
xiǎn zǔ kǎo zhèng gōng huì suàn zhī jiā chéng

normalization.div: 顕祖考鄭公諱算之佳城

text.transcription: 民國六十八己未年陽月吉

trans.div: In the 68th year of the Republic of China, the sun and moon are auspicious

text.transcription: 民國五十二年孟春月吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok Ngóo Tsa̍p Jī Liân Bīng tshun Gue̍h Kiat tuànn
man4 gwok3 ng5 sap6 ji6 nin4 maang6 ceon1 jyut6 gat1 daan3
mínguó wǔ shí èr nián mèng chūn yuè jí dàn

trans.div: Meng Chunyue auspicious day in the 52nd year of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: 𩔰 tsóo khó Guī kang 諱 ńg tsi kha Siânn
𩔰zou2 haau2 ngai6 gung1 wai5 jam3 zi1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
𩔰zǔ kǎo wèi gōng huì yīn zhī jiā chéng

trans.div: 𩔰Ancestor’s Examination of Duke Wei>The Beautiful City of Taoyin

f.f86: [{id:'1',art:['epigraphy'],text:[{id:'t1',role:'government',properties:{backgroundColor:'grey',readability:'readable',preservation:'preserved',writingDirection:'',textColor:'stone',side:'f',script:'chinese'},transcription:'皇清',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'Hông Tshing',cantonese:'wong4 ceng1/cing1',pinyin:'huáng qīng'}},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'date',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'光緒丙?',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'kong sū píng',cantonese:'gwong1 seoi5 bing2',pinyin:'guāng xù bǐng'}},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'person',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'顕考日興林公',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'hián khó li̍t hìng Lîm king',cantonese:'hin2 haau2 jat6 hing1:hing3 lam4 gung1',pinyin:'xiǎn kǎo rì xìng lín gōng'}}]}]

text.transcription: 民國八九年庚辰陽月吉旦

mínguó bā jiǔ nián gēng chén yáng yuè jí dàn

names.name: 將鉅鹿雕刻當魏氏的堂號

text.transcription: 民國九十年已陽月吉旦

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok káu Tsa̍p Liân í iâng gue̍h kiat tuànn
man4 gwok3 gau2 sap6 nin4 ji5 joeng4 jyut6 gat1 daan3
mínguó jiǔ shí nián yǐ yáng yuè jí dàn

trans.div: The 90th year of the Republic of China has passed.

text.transcription: 顯祖妣石氏春霞之佳城

normalization.div: 顯祖妣石氏春霞之佳城

xiǎn zǔ bǐ shí shì chūn xiá zhī jiā chéng
